locked_decision: Use PH-guided recursive scene partitioning, but abandon exact pixel-hit supervision. Raw AIS pixels are only seeds for a Gaussian 0..1 proximity probability field target.
description: PH-assisted U-Net trained to emit a radius-tolerant ship-proximity probability field from brightness plus minimal PH structure channels. Exact AIS pixels are not treated as the primary supervised target.

primary_target.name: radius_probability_field
primary_target.definition: source_pixel = raw_count > 0; target_probability = exp(-distance(source_pixel)^2 / (2 * sigma_pixels^2)), truncated to radius_pixels and masked by valid owner sea pixels
primary_target.prediction: pixel_logits -> sigmoid(pixel_logits) as a 0..1 proximity probability field
primary_target.field_seed: raw AIS count pixels remain exact seed points; the learned target is probability of proximity, not count density and not exact pixel identity

gt_smoothing.rationale: The target is intentionally a proximity probability field because DNB pixels are coarse relative to AIS point locations. This is not count-mass smoothing.

patch_occupancy_auxiliary.rationale: Patch O/X is retained only as a weak regularizer so the model notices empty patches; it is not the reporting target.

dice_auxiliary.rationale: Keep the first probability-field run simple. Dice can be enabled later if weighted BCE collapses to all-background.

spatial_softmax_overlap.rationale: The new pixel head is independent sigmoid, not a per-patch probability distribution softmax.

patching.input_channel_policy: Only physically interpretable observation/topology hints are model inputs. Parent/child PH masks, soft attention, and anchor lifetime are not fed to the U-Net.
patching.supervision_mask: valid owner mask only. Raw AIS pixels seed a Gaussian probability field; exact pixel-hit supervision is not used as the primary objective.

partitioning.policy: PH anchors claim valid sea pixels first. Large PH anchors are recursively subdivided until target size or max depth; fallback grid assigns remaining valid sea pixels exactly once.

hierarchical_ph.policy: When recursive is enabled, child PH clusters that still exceed the target size are not emitted as training patches; their descendants or fallback grid cover the area.

target.role: legacy_sum_preserving_density_for_visualization_compatibility_only; probability-field loss builds its target from raw_count seeds.

loss.name: radius_probability_occupancy_loss
loss.rationale: Train sigmoid pixel logits against a Gaussian proximity probability field seeded by raw_count > 0. Exact pixel-hit BCE is intentionally abandoned.
